title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. marifolium
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. marifolium, commonly known as the Rockrose or Dwarf Rockrose, is a low-growing, perennial shrub native to the alpine regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. marifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote tissue repair.
